function: Identify gap in metrological support for new technologies
template: Анализ показал, что для [...] технологий отсутствует адекватное [...] обеспечение, что ограничивает [...].

function: Identify limitations of existing measurement systems
template: Недостатком существующих информационно-измерительных систем является ограничение по [...] при [...].

template: Существующие подходы к [...] можно классифицировать по следующим признакам: [...], [...], [...].
when_to_use: When building a taxonomy of measurement methods in a survey

function: Explicitly state the research gap identified from the literature.
template: A significant gap remains in [...] , which this thesis aims to address.
when_to_use: To bridge the review of literature and the statement of your own research problem.
common_mistakes: The gap is too obvious or trivial
Not connecting the gap to your specific objective

function: Identify shortcomings in previous studies or technologies.
template: However, these approaches are limited by [...] .
when_to_use: To justify the need for your new approach by critiquing existing work.
common_mistakes: Listing limitations irrelevant to your research

function: Introduce a classification system for existing methods or approaches.
template: Prior work on [...] can be broadly categorized into three groups: [...], [...], and [...] .
when_to_use: In the literature review chapter to organize and present the state of the art.
common_mistakes: Categories are not mutually exclusive or collectively exhaustive
Lack of clear criteria for classification

template: A significant gap exists in [...] for [...] with [...].
when_to_use: When highlighting the novelty of the research.

function: Point out shortcomings of previous studies.
template: Prior work on [...] often neglects [...] or suffers from [...].
when_to_use: When critiquing existing methods in the literature review.

template: Existing approaches to [...] can be categorized into [...], [...], and [...] based on [...].
when_to_use: When organizing literature review sections.

template: We select [...] as baselines because they represent state-of-the-art performance in [...] and are publicly available.
when_to_use: When explaining the choice of comparison methods in the survey or experiment section

function: Compare two or more prior methods
template: Compared to [...], the method proposed by [...] achieves [...] but suffers from [...].
when_to_use: When reviewing competing approaches in the survey

function: Define axes along which prior work is evaluated
template: We evaluate existing methods along the following axes: [...], [...], and [...].
when_to_use: Opening the survey section to set evaluation criteria
common_mistakes: Axes not relevant to the research objective
Too many axes dilute the analysis

function: Identify a gap in the literature
template: Despite significant progress in [...], the problem of [...] in the presence of [...] remains insufficiently studied.
when_to_use: Transition from literature review to problem formulation
common_mistakes: Gap does not match the proposed solution

template: However, the approach of [...] has a significant limitation: it requires [...] and cannot handle [...].
when_to_use: To motivate the need for the proposed approach

function: Position the proposed work relative to prior art
template: Unlike [...], which relies on [...], the proposed method employs [...] to achieve [...].
when_to_use: To differentiate the contribution from related work
common_mistakes: Not naming specific methods being contrasted

function: Classify existing approaches into a taxonomy
template: Existing approaches to [...] can be classified into [...] categories based on [...].
when_to_use: Literature review to organize prior work

template: Основным ограничением существующих подходов является [...]

template: В литературе отсутствуют данные по [...] для [...].

function: Comparing the strengths and weaknesses of existing methods
template: Method A excels in [...] but struggles with [...], while Method B offers [...] at the cost of [...].
when_to_use: When analyzing the trade-offs in the literature.
common_mistakes: Not citing specific papers for each method.

function: Articulating the research gap the thesis aims to fill
template: To date, no method has successfully integrated [...] with [...].
when_to_use: Directly after discussing limitations to state the void.
common_mistakes: Claiming a gap that is too broad or already addressed.
Not connecting the gap directly to the thesis objective.

function: Identifying shortcomings in the existing research
template: A significant limitation of prior work is the assumption that [...].
when_to_use: To motivate the need for the current research.
common_mistakes: Stating limitations without providing evidence or citations.

function: Situating the current work relative to the literature
template: This work builds upon [...] by introducing [...], which addresses [...].
when_to_use: Often in the concluding part of the related work chapter.
common_mistakes: Overclaiming novelty relative to the cited work.
Failing to acknowledge relevant prior art.

function: Classifying prior work into a structured framework
template: Existing approaches can be broadly categorized based on their [...].
when_to_use: In the literature review to provide an organized overview.
common_mistakes: Creating a taxonomy that is not mutually exclusive or collectively exhaustive.
Using categories that are not relevant to the thesis problem.

function: Compare existing approaches on selected criteria
template: Сравнение существующих подходов по критериям [...] показывает, что тепловые сенсоры обеспечивают [...] по сравнению с [...] .
when_to_use: Comparison table discussion in literature review

when_to_use: Defining evaluation framework in literature review
common_mistakes: Criteria not measurable or too subjective

template: Таким образом, в литературе отсутствуют работы, посвящённые [...] с одновременным обеспечением [...] .

function: Position own work relative to prior art
template: В отличие от работ [...] , в настоящей работе предложен подход, основанный на [...] , что позволяет [...] .

function: Justifies the choice of a specific method or component for comparison
template: The choice of [...] for creating the light guide was based on [...].

function: Compares advantages and disadvantages of different prior methods
template: Compared to [...], the approach of [...] offers [...] but is limited by [...].

when_to_use: During the critical analysis of existing literature.
common_mistakes: Providing an unbalanced comparison without acknowledging merits of other methods.

function: Explicitly states the research gap in the literature
template: The literature reveals a gap in the understanding/application of [...] concerning [...].
slots: a neglected aspect or unsolved problem
when_to_use: To transition from the literature review to the proposed work.
common_mistakes: Stating a gap that is already well-addressed in recent work.

function: Identifies a limitation in existing work or methods
template: A key limitation of previous approaches is [...].
when_to_use: In the introduction or survey to motivate the need for the current research.
common_mistakes: Stating limitations without evidence or reference.

function: Classifies existing works or approaches into categories
template: Methods for creating [...] can be classified into [...] based on [...].
when_to_use: When reviewing literature to structure the state-of-the-art.
